plugin_desc: Raritan Dominion SX console-server SNMP baseline child template for devices under Raritan PEN 13742. The shared ConsoleServer SNMP floor supplies MIB-II uptime and IF-MIB 64-bit HC interface traffic. Current public MIB facts confirm the SX product subtree but do not prove stable shared CPU, memory, temperature, fan or power-supply health scalars, so this child template does not promote private objects into shared health metrics.
name: ConsoleServer
